strongestDirection.label: Asymmetric Threshold Keeper
strongestDirection.purpose: Keep approved Otis identity while improving at-a-glance silhouette through weight shift, open-arm negative space, useful hands, slight belly, and lived-in warmth.

identityLocks: Approved Otis Vale identity reference is the first and highest-priority visual input when available.
Older male Lobby Concierge, silver-white hair, rounded white beard and moustache, kind tired eyes, ruddy cheeks, smile lines, mild facial asymmetry.
Soft Santa-adjacent warmth without holiday costume, slight belly, relaxed shoulders, sturdy gentle stance.
Burgundy livery or vest-cardigan hybrid, brass detail, ivory shirt, deep navy or charcoal grounding.
tower-flat-plus-depth-v1, premium adult web-game sprite, clean raster shapes, strong mobile-readable silhouette.

silhouetteDirections.read: One arm opens the elevator path, one hand rests low near belly or key ring; clear negative space beside the torso.
silhouetteDirections.risk: Can become theatrical if the open hand is too high or the gesture reads like a presenter.

silhouetteDirections.read: Plain guest ledger tucked under one arm creates a side-weighted concierge shape while keeping the other hand free.
silhouetteDirections.risk: Can become accountant/administrator if the warmth and front-desk posture are not locked.

silhouetteDirections.read: Low elbows, slight belly, relaxed hands, small brass bell or key ring at waist height; quiet human service posture.
silhouetteDirections.risk: Can be too subtle for the lane if silhouette spacing is not pushed enough.

probeOrder.promptAddOn: Warm open-handed invitation, one hand lifted with clear negative space, other hand relaxed near key ring or slight belly, 3/4 front view, same approved burgundy concierge identity.
Quiet front-desk presence, soft weight shift, both elbows low, slight belly visible, one hand near a small plain brass bell or key ring, no desk rendered.
Lighter oxblood vest-cardigan edit, head slightly tilted, plain dark ledger tucked under one arm, other hand relaxed and open, warm attentive expression.
Heavier charcoal or deep navy layer over oxblood vest, upright but kind, one hand raised in a calm pause gesture, key ring hand low, no security-guard harshness.

fullPoseCoverage.generationRule: Generate one full-body sprite per image after probe preflight succeeds; do not use a seven-pose sheet as production source unless the coordinator changes the source strategy.

sourceContract.background: transparent PNG preferred; otherwise perfectly flat removable neutral/chroma only if preflight accepts it

promotionBlockers: No actual images were generated in this lane.
Previous parent probes failed native 4K and alpha/chroma preflight, so this packet must be treated as generation direction only.
Coordinator must verify source dimensions, transparency/flatness, padding, and app-scale readability before any merge or promotion.
